top_5_fixes: Add schema-level regex constraints for SourceTag/EvidenceID fields to complement validator enforcement.
Expand machine checks to verify one-to-one coverage between high-severity risks and mitigation owners in action plans.
Add freshness validation for external benchmarks (max data age threshold with warning status).
Introduce deterministic evidence index output to map each scored dimension to source, owner, and refresh cadence.
Add CI automation to fail pull requests when validator all_checks_valid is false.
